column1: Such a long way ________ it that we decided to go by train.
So badly ________ I play chess that I almost never agree to have a game.
Pupils are expected to behave politely, as ________ members of staff.
So tired ________ I that I decided to lie down for a while.
Such a threat to society ________ you that I have no choice but to send you to prison.
So cold ________ it last winter that all our pipes froze
Calculators are banned from the examining room, as _______ dictionaries and handheld computers.
I have been having very strange dreams lately, as ________ my twin sister.
